ocr_findings.description: DHCPの役割 diagram (server assigning 192.168.1.2/1.3/1.4 to three computers) captured as image placeholder; internal labels not extracted
試験にはコレが出る！ box icon (mascot image) captured as image placeholder; only bullet text inside box is preserved, which is complete

reviewer_notes: Page 479 of the source. DHCP role explanation and exam tip box. All body text and both bullet points in the 試験にはコレが出る！ box (NATとは… and DHCPとは…) correctly captured. No missing text; diagram is representational image only.
